target.label: Mutagenesis: Decreases intramolecular interactions and facilitates EGF binding. Increased EGF binding; when associated with A-587; A-590 and A-609.
target.rationale: UniProt feature projected onto AlphaFold residue coordinates. Motif score favors Communication/Feedback/Authority and penalizes direct active-site Transition proximity.

matches.name: Circuit breaker
matches.mechanism: Feedback opens a boundary when downstream behavior becomes unsafe, stopping repeated activation attempts.
matches.designPrescription: Stabilize an inactive or open-loop regulatory conformation when activation feedback becomes pathological.

matches.name: Market volatility circuit breaker
matches.mechanism: A dormant regulator activates only when the rate of change crosses a volatility threshold.
matches.designPrescription: Design a use-dependent regulator that preferentially binds high-frequency transition states rather than resting state.

matches.name: Ramp metering
matches.mechanism: A local gate meters entry using downstream congestion feedback rather than local demand alone.
matches.designPrescription: Gate allosteric engagement using tumor-environment or downstream-pathway context instead of local hinge geometry alone.

matches.name: Token bucket rate limiter
matches.mechanism: A regulator meters communication by issuing limited tokens, allowing bursts but throttling sustained activation.
matches.designPrescription: Design a regulator that limits activation throughput without permanently disabling the active site.

matches.name: Debounce filter
matches.mechanism: Fast repeated signals are ignored until a stable interval confirms intent.
matches.designPrescription: Suppress transient dimer-interface contacts while preserving sustained physiological signaling.
